description: Numerical reference ledger for T1 (Instrumented) claims in case studies whose values are NOT captured by the existing measurement-adoption.json or documentation-debt.json sources. Each entry pins a measured number to its case study + measurement-source so the validate-tier-tags.py heuristic has a ledger row to match against. Seeded v7.8.4 to clear 2 known-correct T1 advisories that previously had no ledger match. Extended 2026-05-22 with 3 entries per External Audit #1 (Gemini 2.5 Pro) findings D-004/D-005/D-006.

entries.instrumentation_source: make ui-audit (scripts/ui-audit.py) — P1 finding count from .swift files under FitTracker/Views and FitTracker/DesignSystem

computed_from.formula: sum of (ended_at - started_at) across all phases, in minutes

entries.claim: post-v6 fully-adopted count at synthesis time
entries.instrumentation_source: scripts/measurement-adoption-report.py snapshot 2026-04-27 (now historical — current corpus is 3/34 = 8.8%)
entries.note: Forward-data-drift example: this T1 number reflects state at synthesis time but the live ledger has since moved. Pinned here so the heuristic stops false-flagging the historical fact.

computed_from.metric: sklearn.metrics.silhouette_score on standardized cloud-fingerprint feature space

entries.note: Audit-1 correction C-002 (closes Gemini D-004). T1 claim in HADF Phase 2 case study line 41 + 99 + 102; pinned here so validate-tier-tags has a ledger row.

entries.note: Clears the standing TIER_TAG_LIKELY_INCORRECT advisory on '15/16'. The count is a genuine instrumented gate-set total (15 of 16 covered end-to-end + 1 documented skip), correctly tagged T1 — the heuristic had no ledger row to match against. Confirmed correct in the 2026-06-17 case-study data-integrity audit.
